title: Enable clipboard paste (Ctrl+V) by clicking directly on each timeframe upload slot rectangle

requirements.text: Update the TimeframeUploadSlot component (frontend/src/components/TimeframeUploadSlot.tsx) and the AnalyzeChart page (frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx) so that each individual upload slot rectangle (M1, M3, M5) becomes clipboard-paste-active when the user clicks or taps on it. When a slot is in the active/focused state, pressing Ctrl+V (or triggering a paste event on mobile) must paste the clipboard image directly into that specific slot only — not into all slots simultaneously. Only one slot can be the active paste target at a time. The active slot must display a visible focus indicator (e.g., a highlighted border or subtle glow) so the user knows which slot will receive the pasted image. Clicking outside any slot or selecting a file/camera image for a different slot deactivates the previous active slot. This replaces any existing global paste listener that pastes into the first available slot regardless of user intent.

quotes: no 1m,3m,5m, tenha como selecionar cada retangulo para enviar CTRL +V no 3 opções para facilitar, como fosse clicar aonde eu circulei a ideia

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on the M1 slot rectangle makes it the active paste target; Ctrl+V pastes only into the M1 slot.
Clicking on the M3 slot rectangle makes it the active paste target; Ctrl+V pastes only into the M3 slot.
Clicking on the M5 slot rectangle makes it the active paste target; Ctrl+V pastes only into the M5 slot.
Only one slot is active at a time — activating a new slot deactivates the previously active one.
The currently active slot displays a visible focus indicator (highlighted border or subtle glow).
Clicking outside all slots clears the active paste target so Ctrl+V does not accidentally paste into any slot.
All three slots continue to independently support file picker, camera capture, and drag-and-drop as before.
The 'Analisar Gráfico' button remains active only when at least one slot has an image.
All UI text remains in Portuguese (Brazil).

constraints: Do not change the overall AnalyzeChart page layout or the three-slot structure (M1, M3, M5).
Do not break existing file picker, camera capture, or drag-and-drop functionality for any slot.
Do not alter sessionStorage key names ('chartImage_M1', 'chartImage_M3', 'chartImage_M5') or the navigation flow to ProcessingScreen.
nonGoals: Changing the Results screen layout or analysis logic.
Modifying the ProcessingScreen or local candle analysis engine.
Adding new timeframe options beyond M1, M3, M5.
